name: Teamwork
description: Project management and team collaboration platform.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Teamwork at https://yoursite.teamwork.com
2. Click your profile icon (top right) > Edit My Details
3. Go to the 'API & Mobile' tab
4. Click 'Show Your Token' to reveal your API key
5. Your site name is the subdomain in your URL (e.g., 'mycompany' from mycompany.teamwork.com)
6. Enter both values below

credentialFields.label: Teamwork Site Name
credentialFields.helpText: Your Teamwork site name (the part before .teamwork.com). For example, if your URL is mycompany.teamwork.com, enter 'mycompany'.

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Teamwork > Click your profile > Edit My Details > API & Mobile tab > Show Your Token.
